name: Delivery Syria - Driver App
description: A tailored mobile solution for drivers in Syria, enabling real-time order acceptance, GPS tracking, and route optimization.
features: Real-time background location updates synced directly to the customer map.
Ultra-low battery consumption optimization for continuous tracking.
Precision order notifications and matching based on driver proximity.
Offline trip caching and automatic sync once connectivity is restored.
my_role: Lead Mobile Architect - Designed and implemented a background location tracking system that functions even when the device is locked. To solve the severe battery drain issue associated with continuous GPS tracking, I developed a distance-based filtering algorithm that only triggers GPS polling and database writes when the driver moves more than 10 meters, reducing battery consumption significantly while keeping customer maps accurate.
